name: D.Va

primaryWeapon.name: Fusion Cannons
primaryWeapon.description: Twin short-range cannons with infinite ammo. Strong up close but weaker at range.

passive.name: Tank
passive.description: Reduces knockback and reduces ultimate charge gained by enemies from damaging or healing the tank.

abilities.name: Boosters
abilities.description: Fly forward, knock enemies back, chase targets, escape danger, or contest high ground.

abilities.name: Defense Matrix
abilities.description: Deletes many incoming projectiles in front of D.Va, including dangerous burst damage and some ultimates.

abilities.name: Micro Missiles
abilities.description: Fires a volley of explosive missiles that can be used while firing Fusion Cannons or Boosters.

ultimate.name: Self-Destruct
ultimate.description: D.Va ejects and launches her mech, which explodes after a short delay.

secondaryUltimate.name: Call Mech
secondaryUltimate.description: Pilot D.Va calls down a new mech. The landing can damage nearby enemies.

minor.name: Bunny Power
minor.description: Eject grants 75 temporary overhealth; Call Mech's damage radius increases 50%.

minor.name: Extended Boosters
minor.description: Hitting enemies with Boosters increases their duration by 0.5 seconds.

major.name: Shield System
major.description: Convert 150 health to shields; Defense Matrix restores shields equal to 25% of damage absorbed.

major.name: Heavy Rockets
major.description: Swap Micro Missiles for Heavy Rockets with fewer but harder-hitting explosive projectiles.

lore: Hana Song is a decorated South Korean professional gamer recruited by MEKA to pilot mechs against the relentless Gwishin omnic attacks on the coast. When conventional military tactics failed, the government turned to elite gamers whose reflexes matched those required to pilot the mechs. She streams every mission live to her millions of devoted fans.

name: Doomfist

primaryWeapon.name: Hand Cannon
primaryWeapon.description: Fires short-range bursts from Doomfist's knuckles. Best used between ability combos.

passive.name: The Best Defense...
passive.description: Doomfist gains temporary overhealth when he deals damage with abilities.

abilities.name: Rocket Punch
abilities.description: Charge and punch forward, knocking enemies back. Damage increases if the enemy hits a wall.

abilities.name: Seismic Slam
abilities.description: Leap and slam into enemies, creating space and setting up follow-up pressure.

abilities.name: Power Block
abilities.description: Block frontal damage. Blocking enough damage empowers Rocket Punch.

ultimate.name: Meteor Strike
ultimate.description: Leap into the sky, then crash down onto a targeted area.

minor.name: One-Two
minor.description: Rocket Punch hits reload all Hand Cannon ammo.

minor.name: Survival of the Fittest
minor.description: The Best Defense grants 25 overhealth from eliminations; maximum overhealth increases by 50.

major.name: Seismic Empowerment
major.description: Hitting three or more enemies with Seismic Slam empowers the next Rocket Punch.

major.name: Power Matrix
major.description: Power Block absorbs projectiles during the first second of its duration.

lore: Akande Ogundimu is a Nigerian warrior-philosopher who lost his right arm in a conflict and replaced it with a devastating cybernetic gauntlet. He believes human conflict is a crucible that forges a stronger species, and rose to lead Talon's extremist faction after defeating the previous Doomfist. He is as much an ideologue as he is a weapon.

name: Domina

primaryWeapon.name: Photon Magnum
primaryWeapon.damage: 60 DPS beam, culminating in a high-impact shot
primaryWeapon.description: A medium-range hard-light beam that builds into a high-impact shot. Best used for controlled poke and sustained pressure.

passive.name: Reconstruction
passive.description: Dealing ability damage restores Domina's shield health, rewarding accurate use of Crystal Charge and Sonic Repulsors.

abilities.name: Barrier Array
abilities.description: Constructs a large segmented hard-light barrier. Each panel can be broken separately, allowing Domina to control sightlines and protect her team.

abilities.name: Sonic Repulsors
abilities.damage: 40 knockback damage, 80 if enemy hits a wall
abilities.description: Pushes enemies away from Domina. If enemies are knocked into terrain, they take increased damage and are briefly stunned.

abilities.name: Crystal Charge
abilities.damage: Damage over time while travelling, then explosive detonation
abilities.description: Projects an explosive hard-light crystal that can be reactivated to detonate. Useful for poking through barriers and pressuring grouped enemies.

ultimate.name: Panopticon
ultimate.damage: Up to 300 explosion damage on expiration
ultimate.description: Fires a hard-light barrier that imprisons enemies, blocks outside support and projectiles, then detonates when it expires.

minor.name: Efficient Design
minor.description: After Barrier Array, restore 50 shields and activate health regeneration.

minor.name: Extended Power
minor.description: Photon Magnum range increases 20%.

major.name: Disruptive Detonation
major.description: Crystal Charge explosion slows enemies 30% for 2 seconds.

major.name: Corporate Retreat
major.description: Barrier Array can be moved once while active.

patchHistory.change: Domina added to the Tank roster.
Barrier Array panel health reduced from 250 to 225.

lore: Vaira Singhania is the granddaughter of Vishkar Corporation's founder, raised from birth to be its next leader — a cutthroat perfectionist and razor-sharp negotiator who climbed from private equity to a seat on the Vishkar board. She oversaw Vishkar's winning bid for reconstruction in Rio de Janeiro and rose to Vice President of Operations and Development. When Talon struck Overwatch, she saw not a catastrophe but a business opportunity: global panic would create a power vacuum, and she intends to fill it with Vishkar.

name: Hazard

primaryWeapon.name: Bonespur
primaryWeapon.description: A close-range shotgun used to pressure enemies while Hazard brawls for space.

passive.name: Tank
passive.description: Reduces knockback and reduces ultimate charge gained by enemies from damaging or healing the tank.

abilities.name: Jagged Wall
abilities.description: Creates a damaging wall that blocks routes, disrupts movement, and controls space.

abilities.name: Violent Leap
abilities.description: Leap forward to engage, escape, contest high ground, or pressure vulnerable enemies.

abilities.name: Spike Guard
abilities.description: Reduces incoming damage from the front while threatening nearby enemies with spikes.

ultimate.name: Downpour
ultimate.description: Launches an area-control ultimate that disrupts and pressures grouped enemies.

minor.name: Off the Top
minor.description: Violent Leap's Slash deals 30% more damage to enemies above 250 health.

minor.name: Reconstitution
minor.description: Jagged Wall hits charge Spike Guard by 25 energy; maximum overfill increases by 50.

major.name: Anarchic Zeal
major.description: Spike Guard spikes gain 25% lifesteal.

major.name: Deep Leap
major.description: Violent Leap's range increases 20%.

lore: Oliver Bryne is a former criminal turned extreme-sports daredevil who was exposed to experimental kinetic technology during a botched heist that left his crew dead. The accident gifted him the ability to generate and redirect gravitational force, turning every surface into a weapon. He treats combat as the ultimate extreme sport — one he has no intention of losing.

name: Junker Queen

primaryWeapon.name: Scattergun
primaryWeapon.description: A strong close-range shotgun that rewards aggressive brawling.

passive.name: Adrenaline Rush
passive.description: Junker Queen heals from wound damage she deals to enemies.

abilities.name: Jagged Blade
abilities.description: Throw a magnetic blade. Recalling it can pull enemies and apply wounds.

abilities.name: Commanding Shout
abilities.description: Grants temporary health and movement speed to Junker Queen and nearby allies.

abilities.name: Carnage
abilities.description: Swing a large axe in front of Junker Queen, damaging and wounding enemies.

ultimate.name: Rampage
ultimate.description: Charge forward, wound enemies, and apply anti-heal.

minor.name: Rending Recall
minor.description: Recalling Jagged Blade from a stuck target refreshes the wound.

minor.name: Battle Shout
minor.description: Commanding Shout fully reloads Scatter Gun and increases allied reload speed by 50%.

major.name: Deep Wounds
major.description: Scattergun hits extend wound durations by 0.25 seconds each.

major.name: Savage Satiation
major.description: Carnage's impact damage gains 100% lifesteal.

lore: Odessa "Dez" Stone clawed her way to the throne of Junkertown by defeating every challenger in the settlement's brutal gladiatorial arena. She rules the Outback's largest community with her giant axe "Gracie" and a presence that fills every room she enters. Those who question her authority rarely get a second opportunity.

name: Mauga

primaryWeapon.name: Incendiary and Volatile Chainguns
primaryWeapon.description: One chaingun ignites enemies while the other deals critical damage to burning targets.

passive.name: Berserker
passive.description: Mauga gains temporary overhealth when dealing critical damage.

abilities.name: Overrun
abilities.description: Charge forward unstoppably, then stomp to knock enemies down.

abilities.name: Cardiac Overdrive
abilities.description: Reduces incoming damage and lets Mauga and nearby allies heal from damage dealt.

ultimate.name: Cage Fight
ultimate.description: Creates a barrier arena that traps nearby enemies and gives Mauga unlimited ammo.

minor.name: Kinetic Bandolier
minor.description: Overrun reloads up to 150 ammo while charging.

minor.name: Two Hearts
minor.description: On objectives, counts as two heroes for progress; regenerates 20 health/second while on the objective.

major.name: Firewalker
major.description: Overrun ignites all enemies hit.

major.name: Combat Fuel
major.description: Critical hits grant two temporary overhealth on Cardiac Overdrive's next use; maximum 100.

lore: A colossal Samoan warrior and former Overwatch heavy infantry soldier, Mauga grew bored of the organization's restrictions and joined Talon for the freedom to fight without limits. He is Baptiste's old comrade — the two served together until their paths violently diverged over a question of conscience. Mauga fights not for ideology but for the sheer, uncomplicated joy of battle.

name: Orisa

primaryWeapon.name: Augmented Fusion Driver
primaryWeapon.description: Automatic projectile weapon that uses heat instead of traditional ammo.

passive.name: Tank
passive.description: Reduces knockback and reduces ultimate charge gained by enemies from damaging or healing the tank.

abilities.name: Energy Javelin
abilities.description: Throw a javelin that knocks enemies back and can stun if they hit a wall.

abilities.name: Fortify
abilities.description: Reduces damage taken, grants bonus health, and prevents many crowd-control effects.

abilities.name: Javelin Spin
abilities.description: Spin the javelin to destroy projectiles, push enemies, and move forward.

ultimate.name: Terra Surge
ultimate.description: Pull enemies in, fortify, then release a charged area attack.

minor.name: Heat Dissipator
minor.description: Primary fire critical hits refund heat.

minor.name: Fleeting Bulwark
minor.description: Fortify briefly grants an additional 100 overhealth when activated.

major.name: Charged Javelin
major.description: Hold secondary fire to charge Energy Javelin for increased speed and knockback; pierces enemies at full power.

major.name: Protective Barrier
major.description: Javelin Spin converts to launch a forward-moving barrier instead.

lore: Built by eleven-year-old prodigy Efi Oladele from salvaged OR15 defense robots, Orisa serves as the guardian of Numbani — programmed with Efi's own ideals of protection and justice. Being new to the world, she approaches every challenge with earnest determination and a desire to understand what it means to be a hero. She is living proof that great protectors can come in any form.

name: Ramattra

primaryWeapon.name: Void Accelerator
primaryWeapon.description: Fires a stream of projectiles from Ramattra's staff.

passive.name: Tank
passive.description: Reduces knockback and reduces ultimate charge gained by enemies from damaging or healing the tank.

abilities.name: Void Barrier
abilities.description: Create a temporary barrier at a targeted location.

abilities.name: Nemesis Form
abilities.description: Transform into Nemesis Form, gaining armour and replacing primary fire with piercing punches.

abilities.name: Ravenous Vortex
abilities.description: Fire a nanosphere that creates a slowing field and pulls airborne enemies down.

ultimate.name: Annihilation
ultimate.description: Enter Nemesis Form and create an energy swarm that damages nearby enemies.

minor.name: Void Surge
minor.description: Void Accelerator periodically releases six additional projectiles during continuous fire.

minor.name: Prolonged Barrier
minor.description: Void Barrier's duration increases 25%.

major.name: Nanite Repair
major.description: Healed 50 health/second while within Ravenous Vortex.

major.name: Vengeful Vortex
major.description: While Ravenous Vortex is airborne, press E to detonate it, dealing 50 damage and pulling enemies downward.

lore: Once a gentle Shambali monk who sought peace between humans and omnics through harmony and patience, Ramattra's faith was slowly destroyed by decades of persecution, broken promises, and violence against his kind. He founded Null Sector after concluding that omnic freedom would never be granted — it had to be seized. He is not a villain born of hatred, but of hope that ran out.

name: Reinhardt

primaryWeapon.name: Rocket Hammer
primaryWeapon.description: A large melee hammer that cleaves multiple enemies in front of Reinhardt.

passive.name: Tank
passive.description: Reduces knockback and reduces ultimate charge gained by enemies from damaging or healing the tank.

abilities.name: Barrier Field
abilities.description: Hold up a large frontal energy barrier to protect allies and block damage.

abilities.name: Charge
abilities.description: Charge forward and pin an enemy, dealing heavy damage if they hit a wall.

abilities.name: Fire Strike
abilities.description: Launch a flaming projectile that pierces enemies and can build ultimate charge quickly.

ultimate.name: Earthshatter
ultimate.description: Slam the ground to knock down enemies in front of Reinhardt.

minor.name: Crusader's Resolve
minor.description: While using Barrier Field, passive health regeneration triggers 75% sooner.

minor.name: Crusader's Fire
minor.description: Refund a Fire Strike charge when stunning an enemy; can overfill up to 3 charges.

major.name: Shield Slam
major.description: While Barrier Field is active, use primary fire to damage and knock back enemies.

major.name: Crushing Victory
major.description: Charge damage grants temporary overhealth equal to 50% of damage dealt.

lore: Wilhelm is a towering German crusader who served in Overwatch's legendary Crusader battalion, inspired by his mentor Balderich von Adler's sacrifice to take up the mantle himself. Though the organization fell and he was asked to retire, he refused to stop fighting — still donning his ancient power armor and swinging his Rocket Hammer for justice. He is the last of a dying tradition, and the best of it.

name: Roadhog

primaryWeapon.name: Scrap Gun
primaryWeapon.description: A shotgun-style weapon that deals heavy damage at close range.

passive.name: Tank
passive.description: Reduces knockback and reduces ultimate charge gained by enemies from damaging or healing the tank.

abilities.name: Chain Hook
abilities.description: Throw a hook to pull an enemy toward Roadhog for a follow-up shot.

abilities.name: Take a Breather
abilities.description: Heal yourself and reduce incoming damage while inhaling.

ultimate.name: Whole Hog
ultimate.description: Fire a continuous stream of scrap that knocks enemies back.

minor.name: Scrap Hook
minor.description: Chain Hook hits reload two ammo.

major.name: Invigorate
major.description: Take a Breather rapidly increases movement speed by 30%.

major.name: Hogdrogen Exposure
major.description: Take a Breather heals nearby allies for 50% of its healing.

lore: Mako Rutledge was a Queensland farmer whose land was obliterated in the catastrophic explosion of the Australian omnium — an event he helped trigger as part of the Australian Liberation Front. Hardened by years surviving in the irradiated Outback, he transformed himself into a terrifying road warrior with a gas mask, a custom chain hook, and a simple philosophy. He works as Junkrat's bodyguard for a 50% share of whatever they steal.

name: Sigma

primaryWeapon.name: Hyperspheres
primaryWeapon.description: Launch two bouncing spheres that explode after a short distance or on contact.

passive.name: Tank
passive.description: Reduces knockback and reduces ultimate charge gained by enemies from damaging or healing the tank.

abilities.name: Experimental Barrier
abilities.description: Send out and reposition a floating barrier to control sightlines.

abilities.name: Kinetic Grasp
abilities.description: Absorb incoming projectiles and convert absorbed damage into temporary shields.

abilities.name: Accretion
abilities.description: Gather and throw a mass of debris that knocks enemies down.

ultimate.name: Gravitic Flux
ultimate.description: Lift enemies in a targeted area and slam them back down.

minor.name: Kinetic Cycle
minor.description: Absorbing projectiles with Kinetic Grasp reduces Accretion's cooldown.

minor.name: Massive Impact
minor.description: Accretion's knockdown duration increases up to three seconds based on travel distance.

major.name: Hyper Strike
major.description: Every five direct hits with Hyperspheres, the next Quick Melee levitates and knocks away enemies.

major.name: Levitation
major.description: Activate and hold Double Jump to levitate upward briefly.

lore: Dr. Siebren de Kuiper was a Dutch astrophysicist on the verge of harnessing the power of a black hole when the experiment catastrophically failed, shattering his mind and granting him control over gravity itself. Talon recovered him from a secret military facility and weaponized his fractured brilliance. He exists in a state between terrifying clarity and complete dissociation — quoting poetry one moment, levitating rubble the next.

name: Winston

primaryWeapon.name: Tesla Cannon
primaryWeapon.description: Automatically damages enemies in a short cone, making it strong into mobile or hard-to-aim targets.

passive.name: Tank
passive.description: Reduces knockback and reduces ultimate charge gained by enemies from damaging or healing the tank.

abilities.name: Jump Pack
abilities.description: Leap to engage, escape, contest high ground, or pressure backline heroes.

abilities.name: Barrier Projector
abilities.description: Deploy a bubble barrier that blocks enemy fire and creates temporary safe space.

ultimate.name: Primal Rage
ultimate.description: Gain a large health pool and leap repeatedly, knocking enemies around with melee attacks.

minor.name: Short Circuit
minor.description: Tesla Cannon deals 30% more damage to deployable objects.

minor.name: Heavy Landing
minor.description: During Primal Rage, Jump Pack's damage and area increase up to 75% while airborne.

major.name: Chain Lightning
major.description: Fully charged Secondary Fire bounces to up to two additional targets.

major.name: Revitalizing Barrier
major.description: Barrier Projector heals allies within it at 30 health/second.

lore: A genetically engineered gorilla raised on the Horizon Lunar Colony by the brilliant scientist Dr. Harold Winston, who gave him both his name and his love of knowledge. After an omnic uprising killed most of the colony's scientists, Winston escaped to Earth in a makeshift capsule and joined Overwatch, dedicating himself to heroism in his adoptive father's memory. He misses peanut butter more than almost anything else.

name: Wrecking Ball

primaryWeapon.name: Quad Cannons
primaryWeapon.description: Automatic cannons used to finish targets after disruption combos.

passive.name: Tank
passive.description: Reduces knockback and reduces ultimate charge gained by enemies from damaging or healing the tank.

abilities.name: Roll
abilities.description: Transform into a ball and roll quickly around the map.

abilities.name: Grappling Claw
abilities.description: Attach a claw to terrain and swing to build speed, boop enemies, and engage from unusual angles.

abilities.name: Adaptive Shield
abilities.description: Gain temporary shields based on nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Piledriver
abilities.description: Slam downward from the air, damaging and launching enemies upward.

ultimate.name: Minefield
ultimate.description: Deploy a field of proximity mines that control space and punish movement.

minor.name: Steamroller
minor.description: Roll impacts deal 100% more damage to tanks.

minor.name: Pack Rat
minor.description: Health Packs heal an additional 100 health.

major.name: Hang Time
major.description: Piledriver winds up longer, gaining air control and dealing up to 50% more damage.

major.name: Transfer Efficiency
major.description: Reactivating Adaptive Shield reduces its cooldown by 1.5 seconds per ally affected; health gained per ally increases 33%.

lore: Hammond is a highly intelligent hamster who was part of the same genetic enhancement program as Winston aboard the Horizon Lunar Colony. He escaped in a homemade mech-ball, crash-landed in Junkertown, and became the undefeated champion of the local gladiatorial fighting circuit. His genius is matched only by his complete disinterest in explaining himself to anyone.

name: Zarya

primaryWeapon.name: Particle Cannon
primaryWeapon.description: A beam weapon that becomes much stronger as Zarya gains energy from her barriers.

passive.name: Tank
passive.description: Reduces knockback and reduces ultimate charge gained by enemies from damaging or healing the tank.

abilities.name: Particle Barrier
abilities.description: Place a barrier on yourself. Damage absorbed increases Zarya's energy.

abilities.name: Projected Barrier
abilities.description: Place a barrier on an ally. Damage absorbed increases Zarya's energy.

ultimate.name: Graviton Surge
ultimate.description: Launch a gravity bomb that pulls enemies together for team follow-up.

minor.name: Jump-ups
minor.description: Secondary Fire's self-knockback increases 75%.

minor.name: Graviton Crush
minor.description: Graviton Surge deals up to 30% of enemy max health as damage over time.

major.name: Energy Lance
major.description: Particle Cannon beam pierces enemies while over 50 energy.

major.name: Spotter
major.description: Projected Barrier activates ally health regeneration and increases their movement speed 15%.

lore: Aleksandra Zaryanova was on course to become the world's strongest woman and Russia's greatest athletic hero when the second Omnic Crisis forced her to trade the podium for the front line to defend her homeland. Her particle cannon converts incoming fire into devastating counterattacks — the harder enemies press, the stronger she becomes. She fights with absolute ferocity for the people she loves.

name: Anran

primaryWeapon.name: Zhuque Fans
primaryWeapon.damage: Fiery projectile damage; applies Ignition burn pressure
primaryWeapon.description: Throws fiery fan projectiles that pressure enemies at mid range and help build Ignition burn pressure.

passive.name: Ignition / Flanker
passive.description: Fire attacks can burn enemies. As a Flanker damage hero, Anran benefits from health packs more than standard heroes.

abilities.name: Fan the Flames
abilities.description: Creates a heated wind blast that increases pressure on burning targets.

abilities.name: Inferno Rush
abilities.description: Propels Anran forward in flame, damaging enemies she impacts.

abilities.name: Dancing Blaze
abilities.description: Strikes nearby enemies while briefly avoiding incoming damage, letting Anran dodge danger during an engage.

ultimate.name: Vermillion Ascent / Vermillion Revival
ultimate.description: While alive, Anran charges forward and explodes on impact. If killed with ultimate ready, Vermillion Revival revives her in a fiery explosion.

minor.name: Smoulder
minor.description: Ignited enemies burn 1.5 seconds longer.

minor.name: Heat Shield
minor.description: Gain 50 overhealth per ultimate use and per ignited enemy.

major.name: Short Fuse
major.description: Inferno Rush impact reduces its cooldown by 1.5 seconds.

major.name: Hungering Blaze
major.description: Dancing Blaze healing increases by 25 per strike.

lore: Anran Ye is a prodigy raised from the age of three to surpass her parents — celebrated Omnic Crisis veterans who trained her personally in kung fu, wushu-taolu, and classical Chinese dance, enrolling her in competitions she consistently won. She graduated top of her class at Wuxing University's Fire College and became the gold standard her family measured everything against. When Null Sector attacked Chengdu, she held the line alone so her fellow students could escape — and Winston, watching the footage, recruited her and her younger brother Wuyang to join the newly reunited Overwatch.

name: Ashe

primaryWeapon.name: The Viper
primaryWeapon.damage: High precision hitscan damage; scoped shots hit harder
primaryWeapon.description: A flexible rifle for mid to long range. Ashe can hip-fire quickly or aim down sights for stronger precision shots.

passive.name: Damage
passive.description: Damaging enemies temporarily reduces their received healing.

abilities.name: Coach Gun
abilities.description: Blasts enemies away and knocks Ashe backward, useful for escaping dives or reaching high ground.

abilities.name: Dynamite
abilities.description: Throws dynamite that can be shot to explode early, applying burn damage in an area.

ultimate.name: B.O.B.
ultimate.damage: Charge knock-up and sustained arm-cannon damage
ultimate.description: Summons B.O.B. He charges forward, knocks enemies up, then fires at targets and can contest objectives.

minor.name: Rapid Fire
minor.description: Unscoped shots gain 30% attack speed but deal 15% less damage.

minor.name: Sidewinder
minor.description: Coach Gun pushes Ashe and enemies 20% farther.

major.name: Viper's Sting
major.description: Hitting two consecutive scoped shots on a target deals 25 extra damage and reloads two ammo.

major.name: Airburst
major.description: Dynamite has 40% increased detonation radius while airborne and refunds three ammo when thrown.

lore: Elizabeth Caledonia Ashe grew up in extraordinary wealth but craved the freedom of the outlaw life, eventually founding the Deadlock Gang and building it into the most feared criminal organisation in the American Southwest. Her history with Overwatch's Cassidy is long and complicated — they were close once, before rival loyalties drove them apart. She runs her operation with a lever-action rifle, her imposing omnic enforcer B.O.B., and zero tolerance for disloyalty.

name: Bastion

primaryWeapon.name: Configuration: Recon
primaryWeapon.description: Bastion's mobile rifle mode. Useful for consistent pressure while repositioning.

passive.name: Ironclad / Damage
passive.description: Bastion has extra durability during key forms and applies the Damage role healing reduction through damage.

abilities.name: Configuration: Assault
abilities.description: Transforms Bastion into a slow assault mode with extremely high damage output.

abilities.name: A-36 Tactical Grenade
abilities.description: Fires a bouncing sticky grenade that detonates after a short delay.

ultimate.name: Configuration: Artillery
ultimate.description: Bastion becomes stationary and fires artillery shells at chosen locations.

minor.name: Smart Bomb
minor.description: A-36 Tactical Grenade's self-knockback increases 25%; no longer damages Bastion.

minor.name: Armored Artillery
minor.description: Configuration: Artillery grants 300 temporary overhealth.

major.name: Lindholm Explosives
major.description: Configuration: Assault fires explosive shells instead of the rotary cannon.

major.name: Self-Repair
major.description: Press E to rapidly heal yourself.

lore: Unit SST Laboratories Siege Automaton E54 is a Bastion omnic unit from the Omnic Crisis that spent decades dormant in a German forest, all battle protocols intact but weapons silent. Reawakened to a world at uneasy peace, Bastion formed an unlikely friendship with a small bird and began to discover wonder in the natural world. It struggles daily to reconcile its programming for war with everything it is learning about life.

name: Cassidy

primaryWeapon.name: Peacekeeper
primaryWeapon.description: A powerful revolver rewarding precise aim at close to mid range.

passive.name: Damage
passive.description: Damaging enemies temporarily reduces their received healing.

abilities.name: Combat Roll
abilities.description: Rolls in the chosen direction and reloads Peacekeeper.

abilities.name: Flashbang / Magnetic Grenade
abilities.damage: Burst explosive damage or hinder effect depending on current patch
abilities.description: Cassidy throws a disruptive explosive used to punish mobile enemies.

ultimate.name: Deadeye
ultimate.description: Locks onto visible enemies and fires powerful shots after charging.

minor.name: Quick Draw
minor.description: Fan the Hammer shots individually controlled; headshots deal 50% more damage.

minor.name: Even the Odds
minor.description: Regenerate 20 health/second for each enemy targeted by Deadeye.

major.name: Gun Slingin'
major.description: Critical hits with primary fire reduce Combat Roll cooldown by three seconds.

major.name: Bang Bang
major.description: Throws a second Flashbang that travels farther; both deal 30% reduced damage.

lore: Cole Cassidy grew up as a member of the outlaw Deadlock Gang before being caught and offered a stark choice: prison or Overwatch's classified Blackwatch division. He served as one of Blackwatch's most effective operatives until the fall of Overwatch left him with nothing but a magnetic grenade and a moral compass he's still trying to calibrate. A cowboy through and through, he roams the world doing the right thing one job at a time.

name: Echo

primaryWeapon.name: Tri-Shot
primaryWeapon.description: Fires three projectiles in a triangular pattern, rewarding aim and range control.

passive.name: Glide / Damage
passive.description: Echo can glide while airborne and applies the Damage role healing reduction through damage.

abilities.name: Sticky Bombs
abilities.description: Fires sticky bombs that attach and explode shortly after.

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.description: Echo launches forward and gains free flight for repositioning and aerial pressure.

abilities.name: Focusing Beam
abilities.description: Channels a beam that deals much higher damage to targets below half health.

ultimate.name: Duplicate
ultimate.description: Echo copies an enemy hero and can use their abilities for a limited time.

minor.name: Friendly Imaging
minor.description: Duplicate can target allies.

minor.name: Enhanced Duplication
minor.description: During Duplicate, the clone's first ultimate use extends Duplicate's duration by three seconds.

major.name: Full Salvo
major.description: Sticky Bombs fires 50% more projectiles; all deal 15% less damage.

major.name: High Beams
major.description: Focusing Beam eliminations reset Flight's cooldown.

lore: Echo is a next-generation adaptive AI created by the brilliant Dr. Mina Liao, capable of studying and replicating the abilities of anyone she encounters in battle. She served under Cassidy's watch before the fall of Overwatch, and in the years since her sense of identity has evolved far beyond her original programming. She may be the most genuinely human artificial mind ever created.

name: Emre

primaryWeapon.name: Synthetic Burst Rifle
primaryWeapon.description: A reliable three-round burst rifle for close to mid-range pressure.

passive.name: Altered Vitals / Damage
passive.description: Emre has altered regeneration behaviour and applies Damage role healing reduction through damage.

abilities.name: Cyber Frag
abilities.description: Throws a bouncing grenade to pressure corners and finish damaged enemies.

abilities.name: Siphon Blaster
abilities.description: Equips a temporary blaster that improves Emre's close-range pressure and mobility flow.

ultimate.name: Override Protocol
ultimate.description: Temporarily alters Emre's weapon behaviour and offensive capabilities.

minor.name: Suppressive Security
minor.description: Override Protocol slows enemies 30% for 1 second.

minor.name: Enhanced Agility
minor.description: Siphon Blaster movement speed increases 20% when not firing.

major.name: Heat Sink
major.description: Direct hits refund 60% heat; duration increases 0.1 seconds.

major.name: Cyber Adhesion
major.description: Cyber Frag sticks on contact and deals 40 extra damage to the stuck target.

lore: Emre Sarioglu was a tactical prodigy from Istanbul whose natural leadership and sharp mind made him the first post-Omnic Crisis recruit to the Overwatch Strike Team. After years of watching corruption hollow out the organisation he believed in, he walked away to help the world on his own terms — then disappeared without explanation. He has since resurfaced as a cyborg, struggling against an unknown force that compels him to kill against his will; only his closest ally Freja knows the truth of what he has become.

name: Freja

primaryWeapon.name: Revdraw Crossbow
primaryWeapon.description: A precision crossbow that rewards timing, positioning, and accurate shots.

passive.name: Damage
passive.description: Damaging enemies temporarily reduces their received healing.

abilities.name: Take Aim
abilities.description: Freja focuses a powerful shot for pick pressure.

abilities.name: Quick Dash
abilities.description: A fast repositioning dash for taking angles or escaping pressure.

abilities.name: Updraft
abilities.description: Launches Freja upward to reach high ground and create firing angles.

ultimate.name: Bola Shot
ultimate.description: Fires a bola that can trap and damage enemies, setting up eliminations.

minor.name: Relentless Barrage
minor.description: Take Aim direct hits refund 8 ammo.

minor.name: Momentum Boost
minor.description: Quick Dash distance increases 20%.

major.name: Aerial Recovery
major.description: After Updraft, heal 30 health/second until landing.

major.name: Rising Winds
major.description: Updraft gains an additional charge.

lore: A Danish bounty hunter of minimal words and exceptional precision, Freja tracks the most dangerous quarry across Europe with her signature crossbow and her loyal wolf companion. She operates outside any organisation's jurisdiction, accepting contracts only when they align with a personal moral code few outsiders fully understand. Her targets rarely hear her coming and never see her leave.

name: Genji

primaryWeapon.name: Shuriken
primaryWeapon.description: Throws shuriken in accurate bursts or a close-range fan spread.

passive.name: Cyber-Agility / Damage
passive.description: Genji can double jump and wall climb, and applies Damage role healing reduction through damage.

abilities.name: Deflect
abilities.description: Deflects many incoming projectiles back toward enemies.

abilities.name: Swift Strike
abilities.description: Dashes through enemies, dealing damage and resetting when Genji helps secure an elimination.

ultimate.name: Dragonblade
ultimate.description: Unsheathes a blade for repeated close-range slashes.

minor.name: Acrobatics
minor.description: Swift Strike resets double jump.

minor.name: Dragon's Thirst
minor.description: Dragonblade swings gain 30% lifesteal.

major.name: Blade Twisting
major.description: Swift Strike deals 25 additional damage over time when used shortly after an elimination.

major.name: Meditation
major.description: Regenerate 25 health/second while Deflect is active.

lore: Genji Shimada was the rebellious younger son of a powerful ninja clan who rejected his family's criminal empire — until his brother Hanzo nearly killed him in a duel. Rebuilt as a cyborg by Dr. Angela Ziegler, Genji spent years at war with his own body before the teachings of the Shambali monk Zenyatta guided him toward peace. He is now one of the world's most dangerous warriors, and also one of its most enlightened.

name: Hanzo

primaryWeapon.name: Storm Bow
primaryWeapon.damage: Charged projectile damage with headshot potential
primaryWeapon.description: Fires arrows that deal more damage the longer they are drawn.

passive.name: Wall Climb / Damage
passive.description: Hanzo can climb walls and applies Damage role healing reduction through damage.

abilities.name: Sonic Arrow
abilities.description: Reveals enemies near the arrow's landing point.

abilities.name: Storm Arrows
abilities.description: Allows Hanzo to rapidly fire several arrows at reduced draw time.

abilities.name: Lunge
abilities.description: A horizontal air dash used for repositioning.

ultimate.name: Dragonstrike
ultimate.description: Launches spirit dragons that travel through terrain, damaging enemies in their path.

minor.name: Sonic Disruption
minor.description: Sonic Arrow hacks nearby health packs for 12 seconds.

minor.name: Scatter Arrows
minor.description: Storm Arrows split into three projectiles on first ricochet and bounce two extra times.

major.name: Dragon Fury
major.description: After hitting an enemy with primary fire, gain 25% attack speed for one second.

major.name: Yamagami Technique
major.description: Wall Climb accelerates Lunge cooldown by 250%.

lore: Hanzo Shimada carries the guilt of believing he killed his brother Genji on the orders of the Shimada clan elders, a wound that never healed even as he abandoned the family and became a wandering archer. He travels the world testing himself against worthy opponents, seeking to become worthy of the dragon spirits bound to his blood. When he learned Genji had survived, it shattered and rebuilt him in equal measure.

name: Junkrat

primaryWeapon.name: Frag Launcher
primaryWeapon.description: Launches bouncing grenades that explode on contact with enemies or after bouncing.

passive.name: Total Mayhem / Damage
passive.description: Drops bombs on death and is immune to his own explosives. Applies Damage role healing reduction through damage.

abilities.name: Concussion Mine
abilities.description: Throws a mine that Junkrat can detonate for damage or mobility.

abilities.name: Steel Trap
abilities.description: Places a trap that roots and damages the first enemy who steps into it.

ultimate.name: RIP-Tire
ultimate.description: Controls a motorized tire that climbs walls and explodes on command.

minor.name: Aluminium Frame
minor.description: Steel Trap's throw range increases 50%.

minor.name: Nitro Boost
minor.description: During RIP-Tire, press Shift for a speed boost; reduces RIP-Tire damage 50%.

major.name: Frag Cannon
major.description: Frag Launcher's projectile speed increases 40%; maximum ammo reduces by one.

major.name: Tick Tock
major.description: Concussive Mine arms 0.5 seconds after landing, increasing damage and explosion radius 50% and health 200%.

lore: Jamison Fawkes is a manic, cackling explosives enthusiast born in the irradiated ruins of the Australian Outback, where years of scavenging and exposure to the omnium's fallout left him lean, wild-eyed, and terrifyingly creative with anything that detonates. He found something buried in the ruins of the omnium — a secret so valuable that mercenaries and criminal organisations pursue him relentlessly for it. He's not going to tell anyone what it is, and he leaves Roadhog to do most of the worrying.

name: Mei

primaryWeapon.name: Endothermic Blaster
primaryWeapon.damage: Close-range beam and long-range icicle damage
primaryWeapon.description: Fires a slowing frost stream and accurate icicle projectiles.

passive.name: Damage
passive.description: Damaging enemies temporarily reduces their received healing.

abilities.name: Cryo-Freeze
abilities.description: Mei encases herself in ice, becoming invulnerable and healing.

abilities.name: Ice Wall
abilities.description: Creates a wall of ice pillars to block sightlines, split teams, or lift allies.

ultimate.name: Blizzard
ultimate.description: Deploys Snowball to create a freezing storm that controls an area.

minor.name: Biting Cold
minor.description: Secondary fire hits slow enemies 20% for 1.5 seconds.

minor.name: Permafrost
minor.description: Ice Wall's duration and cooldown each increase by two seconds.

major.name: Deep Freeze
major.description: Continuously hitting enemies with primary fire freezes them briefly.

major.name: Cryo-Storm
major.description: Cryo-Freeze slows and deals 70 damage/second to nearby enemies.

lore: Dr. Mei-Ling Zhou is a climatologist who volunteered to staff a remote Overwatch Ecopoint in Antarctica, only to be trapped there when a catastrophic storm damaged the facility and her entire team went into cryosleep as a last resort. She woke up alone years later to find Overwatch disbanded and the global climate in even worse shape than when she left. Armed with her endothermic blaster and an enduring optimism, she fights to protect the planet while there is still time.

name: Pharah

primaryWeapon.name: Rocket Launcher
primaryWeapon.description: Fires explosive rockets that deal direct and splash damage.

passive.name: Hover Jets / Damage
passive.description: Pharah can hover with jump jets and applies Damage role healing reduction through damage.

abilities.name: Jump Jet
abilities.description: Launches Pharah upward to take aerial angles.

abilities.name: Concussive Blast
abilities.description: Fires a concussive projectile that knocks enemies or Pharah away.

ultimate.name: Barrage
ultimate.description: Pharah launches a rapid barrage of rockets while stationary.

minor.name: Drift Thrusters
minor.description: Pharah can move while Barrage is active.

minor.name: Helix Shields
minor.description: Convert 75 health to shields.

major.name: Concussive Implosion
major.description: Concussive Blast's knockback inverts to pull enemies inward.

major.name: Fuel Stores
major.description: Jet Dash grants 50% fuel; maximum overfuel increases by 100%.

lore: Fareeha Amari dreamed her whole life of following her mother Ana into Overwatch, but her application was denied — and then the organisation collapsed before she could try again. She channelled that drive into becoming chief of security for Helix International, protecting classified sites across Egypt and beyond in a powerful exo-suit. She leads with the same unwavering conviction that defined her mother, and has spent years learning how much of it was actually her own.

name: Reaper

primaryWeapon.name: Hellfire Shotguns
primaryWeapon.description: Dual shotguns that deal massive damage at close range and fall off at distance.

passive.name: The Reaping / Damage
passive.description: Reaper heals from a portion of damage dealt and applies Damage role healing reduction through damage.

abilities.name: Wraith Form
abilities.description: Reaper becomes invulnerable and faster but cannot shoot.

abilities.name: Shadow Step
abilities.description: Teleports to a targeted location after a short cast.

ultimate.name: Death Blossom
ultimate.description: Reaper spins and fires both shotguns, damaging nearby enemies.

minor.name: Death's Shadow
minor.description: Shadow Step reloads Hellfire Shotguns; range increases 25%.

minor.name: Soul Reaving
minor.description: Collect Soul Globes from dead enemies to restore 50 health.

major.name: Dire Triggers
major.description: Use secondary fire to fire a precise long-range volley from both Hellfire Shotguns.

major.name: Ravenous Wraith
major.description: Leaving Wraith Form grants 40% additional lifesteal for three seconds.

lore: Gabriel Reyes co-founded Overwatch alongside Jack Morrison and commanded its covert division Blackwatch, until betrayal and a catastrophic confrontation left him in a state between life and death — capable of phasing through the physical world and absorbing vitality from those he defeats. He now serves Talon as an instrument of pure destruction, driven by a cold fury that long ago consumed whatever idealism once lived there. He and Soldier: 76 share a past that neither has forgiven.

name: Shion

primaryWeapon.name: Kira Pistols
primaryWeapon.damage: Fast pistol damage with critical hit potential
primaryWeapon.description: Dual pistols that can be fired individually, giving Shion flexible close to mid-range pressure.

passive.name: Flanker / Damage
passive.description: As a Flanker damage hero, Shion benefits from health packs more than standard heroes and applies Damage role healing reduction.

abilities.name: Execution
abilities.description: Fires multiple X-shaped volleys. Holding the ability tightens the spread for higher single-target pressure.

abilities.name: Evade
abilities.description: Dashes and briefly grants overhealth, helping Shion survive aggressive flanks.

abilities.name: Joyride
abilities.description: Activates a motorbike that can be ridden for mobility or launched at enemies.

ultimate.name: Satsuriku Spree
ultimate.description: Performs three rapid omnidirectional rushes with gunfire, allowing Shion to tear through scattered enemies.

minor.name: Rapid Reload
minor.description: Evade reloads 9 ammo.

minor.name: X Machina
minor.description: Execution deals 20% more damage to enemies below half health.

major.name: Refuel
major.description: Joyride restores 50 health and regenerates 20 health/second during use.

major.name: Faces of Death
major.description: Gain all damage subrole passives.

lore: An omnic who Awakened into Tokyo's Omnic Crisis amid screams and gunfire, Shion spent weeks surviving alone on the streets before being captured by the humans who would go on to found the Hashimoto Clan, who kept her alive to sharpen their fighting techniques against her. Secretly she held back, studying their weaknesses and biding her time — until she killed all four Hashimoto elders and carved out a fifth seat on the council for herself. She has since modified her chassis to appear uncannily human, rebuilt the Hashimoto into a force that serves her vision alone, and lives with characteristic excess: fashion, lovers, and custom motorcycles.

name: Sierra

primaryWeapon.name: Helix Rifle
primaryWeapon.damage: Sustained rifle damage; accuracy improves with sustained fire
primaryWeapon.description: An automatic rifle that becomes more accurate the longer it is fired.

passive.name: Recon / Damage
passive.description: Damaging low-health enemies can reveal them through walls. Sierra also applies Damage role healing reduction.

abilities.name: Tracking Shot
abilities.description: Tags enemies so Sierra can maintain pressure and improve follow-up accuracy.

abilities.name: Anchor Drone
abilities.duration: Drone persists until destroyed or dismissed
abilities.description: Deploys a drone that Sierra can grapple toward, giving her flexible repositioning.

abilities.name: Tremor Charge
abilities.damage: High center damage with lower edge damage
abilities.description: Throws a charge that creates a damaging shockwave and knockback.

ultimate.name: Trailblazer
ultimate.description: Calls in a bombing run across an area, heavily punishing grouped or trapped enemies.

minor.name: Full Flight
minor.description: Anchor Drone flight and grapple range increases 25%.

minor.name: Tight Grip
minor.description: Helix Rifle spread tightens 70% faster and widens 30% slower.

major.name: Medi-Drone
major.description: Anchor Drones carry a medkit.

major.name: Locked In
major.description: Tracking Shot hit grants 20% attack speed for 2 seconds.

lore: Sierra Turner Woods grew up always on the move with her mother Kendra, never told why — until the day Kendra disappeared just before Sierra's thirteenth birthday, leaving only an emergency bus ticket and no explanation. That trail led her to the father she had never met, and eventually to Helix Security, where as head of security at Watchpoint: Grand Mesa she uncovered the truth: her mother had been Soldier: 00, one of the first subjects in the US Soldier Enhancement Program. When Talon attacked Grand Mesa, Sierra led her squad alongside Overwatch and joined their ranks — determined to find the answers her mother never gave her.

name: Sojourn

primaryWeapon.name: Railgun
primaryWeapon.damage: Sustained primary fire builds high burst secondary fire
primaryWeapon.description: Primary fire builds energy, then secondary fire releases a powerful rail shot.

passive.name: Damage
passive.description: Damaging enemies temporarily reduces their received healing.

abilities.name: Power Slide
abilities.description: Slides along the ground and can jump out for vertical mobility.

abilities.name: Disruptor Shot
abilities.damage: Damage over time / slow depending on current patch
abilities.description: Launches an energy field that pressures and controls an area.

ultimate.name: Overclock
ultimate.description: Automatically charges Sojourn's railgun, enabling repeated high-damage shots.

minor.name: Extended Mag
minor.description: Maximum ammo increases by 15.

minor.name: Overcharged
minor.description: Railgun maximum energy increases by 50 while Overclock is active.

major.name: Dual Thrusters
major.description: Power Slide gains an additional charge; jump height shifts to lateral movement.

major.name: Adhesive Siphon
major.description: Disruptor Shot sticks to enemies and generates Railgun energy when dealing damage.

lore: Vivian Chase is a veteran Overwatch soldier and former Canadian military officer whose body was heavily damaged in combat and rebuilt with cutting-edge cybernetics, including a powerful railgun arm. She came out of retirement when Overwatch was recalled, bringing decades of hard-won tactical experience and the same fierce conviction she had when she first enlisted. She fights to build the version of Overwatch that should have existed all along.

name: Soldier: 76

primaryWeapon.name: Heavy Pulse Rifle
primaryWeapon.description: A reliable automatic rifle with strong tracking damage at mid range.

passive.name: Damage
passive.description: Damaging enemies temporarily reduces their received healing.

abilities.name: Helix Rockets
abilities.description: Fires a burst of rockets for finishing targets or burst damage.

abilities.name: Sprint
abilities.description: Run faster while not firing.

abilities.name: Biotic Field
abilities.description: Places a field that heals Soldier: 76 and nearby allies.

ultimate.name: Tactical Visor
ultimate.description: Automatically aims at visible enemies within line of sight.

minor.name: Recycled Pulse Munitions
minor.description: Helix Rockets reload 15 ammo if they damage an enemy.

minor.name: Field Emergency
minor.description: Biotic Field's healing increases 100% on critically wounded allies.

major.name: Agility Training
major.description: Sprint speed increases 20%; reload is performable while sprinting.

major.name: Stim Pack
major.description: Biotic Field becomes a Stim Pack, increasing attack and reload speed 30% but preventing self-healing for four seconds.

lore: Jack Morrison was the face of Overwatch — the idealistic, golden-boy commander who embodied everything the organisation stood for — until internal betrayal, a catastrophic confrontation with Gabriel Reyes, and the fall of Overwatch left him presumed dead. He returned as the anonymous vigilante Soldier: 76, waging a one-man war to expose the conspiracy that destroyed what he built. He wears no insignia, trusts almost no one, and has not stopped fighting for a single day.

name: Sombra

primaryWeapon.name: Machine Pistol
primaryWeapon.description: A rapid-fire machine pistol best used at close range from off angles.

passive.name: Opportunist / Damage
passive.description: Sombra can detect vulnerable enemies and applies Damage role healing reduction through damage.

abilities.name: Hack
abilities.description: Hacks enemies or health packs, interrupting certain abilities and revealing targets.

abilities.name: Virus
abilities.description: Fires a projectile that damages enemies over time, especially effective after Hack.

abilities.name: Translocator
abilities.description: Throws a beacon and teleports to it, enabling engages and escapes.

abilities.name: Stealth
abilities.description: Sombra becomes invisible, allowing scouting and backline access.

ultimate.name: EMP
ultimate.damage: Percent health damage and ability disruption
ultimate.description: Hacks enemies in a large area, damages them, and destroys barriers/shields depending on current patch.

minor.name: Encrypted Upload
minor.description: Hack is usable while invisible; successful hacks increase stealth duration by two seconds.

minor.name: CTRL ALT ESC
minor.description: Teleporting with Translocator at critical health initiates passive health regeneration.

major.name: White Hat
major.description: Hack is usable on allies to restore 100 health over two seconds.

major.name: Viral Replication
major.description: Hitting a hacked enemy with Virus spreads it to enemies within 8 metres.

lore: An orphan from Mexico City's post-Crisis slums who survived by learning to exploit the secrets of the powerful, Sombra grew into the world's most dangerous information broker — invisible, irreplaceable, and loyal to absolutely no one permanently. She discovered the edges of a global conspiracy so vast it swallowed Talon whole without even noticing, and she has been quietly pulling threads ever since. Her true agenda is the only thing she has never hacked her way out of.

name: Symmetra

primaryWeapon.name: Photon Projector
primaryWeapon.damage: Ramping beam damage and charged orb damage
primaryWeapon.description: A beam weapon that ramps up with sustained contact and can fire charged orbs.

passive.name: Damage
passive.description: Damaging enemies temporarily reduces their received healing.

abilities.name: Sentry Turret
abilities.description: Places small turrets that damage and slow enemies.

abilities.name: Teleporter
abilities.description: Creates a two-way teleporter for allies and some deployables.

ultimate.name: Photon Barrier
ultimate.description: Creates a massive map-wide barrier that blocks enemy fire.

minor.name: Sentry Capacity
minor.description: Sentry Turret gains an additional charge.

minor.name: Advanced Teleportation
minor.description: Teleporter range increases 50%.

major.name: Perfect Alignment
major.description: Primary fire range increases 15% with each additional charge level.

major.name: Shield Battery
major.description: Symmetra regenerates 20 shields/second within 10 metres of her Teleporter.

lore: Satya Vaswami is a gifted architect of hard-light constructs who grew up in poverty before the Vishkar Corporation selected her for their elite training programme, and she repays that opportunity through absolute dedication to their vision of engineered social order. She carries out morally ambiguous missions with the belief that Vishkar's order — however imposed — produces better lives than the chaos it replaces. Reality is something she builds, controls, and believes in completely.

name: Torbjörn

primaryWeapon.name: Rivet Gun
primaryWeapon.damage: Long-range rivets and close-range shotgun burst
primaryWeapon.description: Fires long-range rivets or a close-range shotgun-style burst.

passive.name: Damage
passive.description: Damaging enemies temporarily reduces their received healing.

abilities.name: Deploy Turret
abilities.description: Deploys a turret that automatically fires at enemies.

abilities.name: Overload
abilities.description: Grants temporary health, movement speed, reload speed, and firing speed.

ultimate.name: Molten Core
ultimate.description: Creates pools of molten slag that damage enemies and deny space.

minor.name: Craftsman
minor.description: Forge Hammer restores armour health to allies; turret repair healing increases 25%.

minor.name: Loaded
minor.description: Activating Overload fully refills Rivet Gun's ammo.

major.name: Anchor Bolts
major.description: Deploy Turret throw range increases 50%; can attach to walls and ceilings.

major.name: Overloaded Turret
major.description: Overload temporarily upgrades the Turret for five seconds, increasing its health and damage.

lore: Torbjörn Lindholm is a legendary Swedish engineer whose designs power both Overwatch's hardware and an uncomfortable number of its enemies' weapons. He deploys turrets, fabricates armour from battlefield salvage, and maintains a running commentary on everything going wrong around him. His prosthetic arm is just one of many souvenirs from wars he didn't start and refused to lose.

name: Tracer

primaryWeapon.name: Pulse Pistols
primaryWeapon.description: Rapid dual pistols that excel at close range but lose value at distance.

passive.name: Flanker / Damage
passive.description: Tracer has high mobility and benefits from flanker play; damaging enemies applies the Damage role healing reduction.

abilities.name: Blink
abilities.description: Dash a short distance in the direction Tracer is moving. Has multiple charges.

abilities.name: Recall
abilities.description: Returns Tracer to her recent position, restoring previous health and ammo state.

ultimate.name: Pulse Bomb
ultimate.description: Throws a bomb that sticks to enemies or surfaces and explodes after a short delay.

minor.name: Blink Packs
minor.description: Health Packs restore one Blink charge.

minor.name: Blast from the Past
minor.description: Pulse Bomb's radius increases 50%.

major.name: Flashback
major.description: Recall restores all Blink charges.

major.name: Quantum Entanglement
major.description: Recall grants 50 overhealth that decays over time.

lore: Lena Oxton was a rising British Overwatch pilot whose experimental slipstream fighter malfunctioned and desynchronised her from time, leaving her unable to hold a physical form until Dr. Winston built her a chronal accelerator to anchor her to the present. She repaid him by becoming Overwatch's most beloved and unstoppable operative, fast in every sense of the word. She lives in the moment more literally than anyone else alive.

name: Vendetta

primaryWeapon.name: Palatine Fang
primaryWeapon.description: A melee-focused hard-light sword with strong close-range dueling pressure.

passive.name: Onslaught / Damage
passive.description: Successful strikes increase Vendetta's movement and attack speed. Damage dealt also applies the Damage role healing reduction.

abilities.name: Warding Stance
abilities.damage: Can deflect or punish melee pressure
abilities.description: Reduces frontal damage and can deflect melee attacks, consuming energy.

abilities.name: Whirlwind Dash
abilities.description: Lunges forward and performs a spinning sword attack.

abilities.name: Projected Edge
abilities.description: Launches a hard-light slice forward when Vendetta has energy.

abilities.name: Soaring Slice
abilities.description: Throws her sword and flies to its location, enabling aggressive engages or escapes.

ultimate.name: Sundering Blade
ultimate.description: Unleashes a massive sword attack in front of Vendetta that cuts through defensive layers.

minor.name: Extra Edge
minor.description: Projected Edge costs 25% less energy.

minor.name: Raging Storm
minor.description: Whirlwind Dash continues spinning for 3 more hits, dealing 30 damage each.

major.name: Siphoning Strike
major.description: Overhead strikes gain 40% lifesteal.

major.name: Relentless
major.description: Onslaught stacks 3 more times; each stack grants 5% attack speed and 2% movement speed.

lore: Marzia Bartalotti grew up the daughter of Talon boss Antonio Bartalotti, raised with promises of power and pride in her heritage — until Blackwatch killed her father and she lost claim to everything he had built. Driven by spite, she reinvented herself as Vendetta: a ruthless gladiatorial champion in Rome's Colosseo who fought her way to the title of Colosseo Champion and earned the name La Lupa Della Ritorsione — The Wolf of Retribution. She has built wealth and a network of powerful allies across Italy, and is now closing in on Talon to reclaim the empire she was promised.

name: Venture

primaryWeapon.name: Smart Excavator
primaryWeapon.description: Fires explosive shots that are strongest at close to mid range.

passive.name: Explorer's Resolve / Damage
passive.description: Venture gains temporary shields from using abilities and applies Damage role healing reduction through damage.

abilities.name: Drill Dash
abilities.description: Dash forward with the drill, damaging enemies and repositioning.

abilities.name: Burrow
abilities.description: Burrow underground, becoming untargetable before emerging to damage enemies.

abilities.name: Clobber
abilities.description: Venture's melee deals additional damage compared with standard quick melee.

ultimate.name: Tectonic Shock
ultimate.description: Sends damaging shockwaves through the ground in front of Venture.

minor.name: Deep Burrow
minor.description: Drill Dash distance increases 50% while burrowed.

minor.name: Excavation Exhilaration
minor.description: Tectonic Shock cooldowns refresh 300% faster.

major.name: Smart Extender
major.description: Empower SMART Excavator for a 100% range increase for 4 seconds.

major.name: Covered in Dirt
major.description: Clobber grants up to 30 shields.

lore: Dr. Sloane is a non-binary archaeologist and geologist of extraordinary enthusiasm who became obsessed with the omnic structures buried deep beneath the Earth's surface after discovering one on a routine dig. Equipped with a powerful excavation drill that doubles as a close-range weapon, they bore through enemies and terrain alike without pausing to distinguish between the two. Every battlefield is a potential dig site.

name: Widowmaker

primaryWeapon.name: Widow's Kiss
primaryWeapon.damage: High scoped headshot damage; automatic close-range fire
primaryWeapon.description: A scoped sniper rifle capable of lethal precision shots, with automatic fire for close defense.

passive.name: Damage
passive.description: Damaging enemies temporarily reduces their received healing.

abilities.name: Grappling Hook
abilities.description: Launches a hook that pulls Widowmaker to a ledge or surface.

abilities.name: Venom Mine
abilities.description: Deploys a mine that poisons enemies and reveals them when triggered.

ultimate.name: Infra-Sight
ultimate.description: Reveals enemy locations through walls to Widowmaker and her team.

minor.name: Scoped Efficiency
minor.description: Scoped shots cost three ammo instead of five.

minor.name: Focused Aim
minor.description: Scoped shots charge 50% faster during Infra-Sight.

major.name: Escape Plan
major.description: Scoped shot hits reduce Grappling Hook cooldown by up to four seconds.

major.name: Deadly Deux
major.description: Venom Mine gains 50% increased damage and a second charge, enabling two active mines.

lore: Amélie Lacroix was once a warm, brilliant woman and wife of Overwatch agent Gérard Lacroix — until Talon kidnapped her, spent weeks reprogramming her, and returned her to Gérard as a sleeper agent who killed him in his sleep. They completed the transformation, slowing her heart rate to near-stillness and eliminating the capacity for the emotions that might compromise her aim. She carries no memory of who she was before, and no grief for the loss.

name: Ana

primaryWeapon.name: Biotic Rifle
primaryWeapon.damage: 75 damage to enemies / 75 healing to allies per shot
primaryWeapon.description: Long-range rifle that heals allies or damages and debuffs enemies. Can be scoped for a hitscan shot. Shots pass through barriers.

passive.name: Support
passive.description: Passively regenerates health after a short period without taking damage.

abilities.name: Sleep Dart
abilities.description: Fires a dart that puts an enemy to sleep. Sleeping enemies cannot act but wake if damaged.

abilities.name: Biotic Grenade
abilities.description: Area grenade that heals allies and boosts their healing received, while preventing enemies from being healed.

ultimate.name: Nano Boost
ultimate.description: Grants a targeted ally increased damage output and damage resistance for a short duration.

minor.name: Groggy
minor.description: Enemies waking from Sleep Dart are slowed 50% and take 50 damage over two seconds.

minor.name: Speed Serum
minor.description: Nano Boost grants a 30% movement speed boost to both Ana and her target.

major.name: Headhunter
major.description: Biotic Rifle can critically hit enemies.

major.name: Biotic Bounce
major.description: After exploding, Biotic Grenade bounces and explodes again for 60 damage and healing.

lore: Ana Amari is a founding member of Overwatch and one of the finest snipers the world has ever seen, whose legendary career was cut short when Widowmaker shot out her eye during a mission and left her for dead. Rather than return to Overwatch and her daughter Pharah, she chose to stay hidden — until the state of the world made continued hiding feel like a different kind of failure. She came back armed with a biotic rifle, a lifetime of experience, and the patience only grandmothers and snipers share.

name: Baptiste

primaryWeapon.name: Biotic Launcher
primaryWeapon.type: Three-round burst rifle / healing grenade launcher
primaryWeapon.damage: 25 damage per burst (primary) / 50–65 healing per grenade (secondary)
primaryWeapon.description: Primary fire is a three-round burst for dealing damage. Secondary fire lobs healing grenades that heal allies near the impact.

passive.name: Exo Boots / Shoulder Turret
passive.description: Crouching charges Exo Boots for a high jump. Using any ability triggers a Shoulder Turret that fires up to 3 shots at nearby allies, each restoring 40 health.

abilities.name: Regenerative Burst
abilities.description: Instantly heals Baptiste and nearby allies, then heals again over time. Targets below half health receive double the instant heal.

abilities.name: Immortality Field
abilities.description: Deploy a device that prevents all nearby allies from dying. The device can be destroyed by enemies.

ultimate.name: Amplification Matrix
ultimate.damage: Doubles allied projectile damage and healing passing through the matrix
ultimate.description: Projects a large matrix that doubles the damage and healing of allied projectiles that pass through it.

minor.name: Field Medicine
minor.description: Immortality Field restores 80 health to nearby allies and 40 to Baptiste when destroyed.

minor.name: Automated Healing
minor.description: After placing Amplification Matrix, Shoulder Turret fires up to 12 shots periodically, each restoring 25 health to allies.

major.name: Assault Burst
major.description: Regenerative Burst grants 20% attack speed for four seconds; no longer instantly heals.

major.name: Rocket Boots
major.description: While airborne from Exo Boots, press Space to dash horizontally.

lore: Jean-Baptiste Augustin grew up in poverty in post-Crisis Haiti and joined Talon's paramilitary as the only viable path out — a choice he rationalised until he watched his unit massacre civilians on a routine contract. He went AWOL, became a combat medic, and has spent years trying to counterbalance what he enabled. He heals not out of idealism but out of a very specific, very personal kind of accounting.

name: Brigitte

primaryWeapon.name: Rocket Flail
primaryWeapon.damage: 35 damage per swing in a wide arc
primaryWeapon.description: A large flail that swings in a wide arc, striking multiple close-range targets.

passive.name: Inspire
passive.description: Dealing damage with Rocket Flail heals nearby allies over a short period.

abilities.name: Repair Pack
abilities.description: Throw a healing pack to an ally. Excess healing converts into temporary armour.

abilities.name: Whip Shot
abilities.description: Fling the flail forward to deal damage and knock an enemy back at range.

abilities.name: Barrier Shield
abilities.description: Raise a frontal energy barrier that absorbs incoming damage and enables Shield Bash.

abilities.name: Shield Bash
abilities.description: Dash forward with the barrier, stunning the first enemy hit.

ultimate.name: Rally
ultimate.description: Move faster and provide lasting overhealth armour to all nearby allies. Also grants Brigitte additional personal armour.

minor.name: Combat Medic
minor.description: Melee attacks reduce Repair Pack cooldown by 0.75 seconds.

minor.name: Morale Boost
minor.description: Inspire lasts 3 seconds longer when triggered by Whip Shot.

major.name: Inspiring Strike
major.description: Shield Bash grants 30% movement speed for 2 seconds and instantly activates Inspire.

major.name: Whiplash
major.description: Whip Shot wall slam deals 60 extra damage.

lore: Brigitte Lindholm is the daughter of the legendary engineer Torbjörn and the goddaughter of the crusader Reinhardt, who grew up surrounded by heroes but preferred to be the person keeping their armour from falling apart. When Reinhardt came out of retirement and charged back into danger, she followed as his squire — and then realised she was more than a squire. She fights with a flail and a repair pack and a loyalty to the people she loves that is completely without condition.

name: Illari

primaryWeapon.name: Solar Rifle
primaryWeapon.damage: 75 damage per shot (scoped) / healing beam on secondary fire
primaryWeapon.description: Long-range scoped rifle for precise damage. Secondary fire channels a high-output healing beam onto a targeted ally.

passive.name: Sol
passive.description: Using a movement ability triggers passive health regeneration for a short duration.

abilities.name: Healing Pylon
abilities.description: Deploy a pylon that automatically heals nearby allies. Only one pylon can exist at a time.

abilities.name: Outburst
abilities.description: Launch yourself in the direction you are moving, knocking back nearby enemies. Enhanced when crouching.

ultimate.name: Captive Sun
ultimate.damage: High burst damage to affected enemies
ultimate.description: Fire an explosive ball of solar energy that slows enemies in a large area and causes them to burst when they take further damage.

minor.name: Rapid Construction
minor.description: Healing Pylon builds 300% faster; cooldown reduces by 1.5 seconds.

minor.name: Summer Solstice
minor.description: Illari's flight time during Captive Sun increases three seconds; flight speed increases 20%.

major.name: Solar Power
major.description: Fully charged Solar Rifle hits grant 12.5% maximum solar energy; can overfill up to 50%.

major.name: Sunburn
major.description: Outburst ignites enemies, dealing 70 damage over three seconds.

lore: Illari Quispe is the sole survivor of the Inti Warriors, a Peruvian group gifted with solar-powered abilities who were destroyed on a mission that Illari helped plan, carrying guilt she has never put down. She channels the sun's energy through her rifle and healing pylon, fighting to ensure her comrades' sacrifice built something that lasts. Every beam of light she fires carries the weight of people who aren't here to fire their own.

name: Jetpack Cat

primaryWeapon.name: Biotic Pawjectiles
primaryWeapon.damage: Heals allies or damages enemies per pellet; up to 45 damage if all 5 pellets headshot
primaryWeapon.description: Fire a spread of 5 projectiles that heal allies or damage enemies on contact.

passive.name: Jetpack
passive.description: Permanent flight — Jetpack Cat remains airborne throughout combat. As a Tactician support, excess ultimate charge carries over to the next ultimate cycle.

abilities.name: Frenetic Flight
abilities.description: Accelerate rapidly in your movement direction. Fuel recovers more slowly while towing a player with Lifeline.

abilities.name: Lifeline
abilities.description: Toggle into transport mode to tow an ally alongside you. Increases movement speed and heals the ally while they are being carried.

abilities.name: Purr
abilities.damage: 30% of healing output as damage to nearby enemies
abilities.description: Emit a pulsing area heal that increases in frequency over time. Enemies within the pulse take damage equal to 30% of its healing output.

ultimate.name: Catnapper
ultimate.description: Dive toward a ground location, knocking down all nearby enemies. The nearest enemy is tethered to Jetpack Cat after landing.

minor.name: Ulterior Motive
minor.description: 15% of healing output recovers fuel.

minor.name: Transport Shielding
minor.description: Gain up to 50 extra shields while carrying another player.

major.name: Headbutt
major.description: High-speed flying knocks back an enemy for 50 damage.

major.name: Claws Out
major.description: Empowered melee every 6 seconds wounds the target for 40 damage and slows them 30% for 1 second.

lore: Fika is a stray cat who wandered into Watchpoint: Gibraltar's landing bay and was adopted by Brigitte Lindholm, who named her after her Kanelbullar-like colouring and insatiable appetite for treats. Building a jetpack for a cat had been Brigitte's childhood dream — she'd even drafted plans years earlier for a previous cat named Mitzi — and finding Fika nestled among discarded rocket parts finally gave the idea its pilot. When Talon attacked Gibraltar, Brigitte shelved the project, then reconsidered: if Overwatch was going to stand a chance against this new threat, they would need all the help they could get.

name: Juno

primaryWeapon.name: Mediblaster
primaryWeapon.damage: Heals allies or damages enemies; falls off beyond 25 metres
primaryWeapon.description: A burst-fire weapon that heals allies and damages enemies in the same shots. Effectiveness reduces at medium to long range.

passive.name: Glide Boost
passive.description: While airborne, Juno can double jump and hold jump to hover, giving her strong aerial mobility and positioning.

abilities.name: Pulsar Torpedoes
abilities.damage: Damages enemies / heals allies over time
abilities.description: Lock on to targets, then fire homing torpedoes that heal allies or damage enemies over time.

abilities.name: Hyper Ring
abilities.description: Deploy a ring that increases the movement speed of allies who pass through it.

ultimate.name: Orbital Ray
ultimate.damage: Damages enemies and heals allies in the beam's path
ultimate.description: Call down an orbital beam that simultaneously damages enemies and heals allies caught in its path.

minor.name: Familiar Vitals
minor.description: Pulsar Torpedoes lock onto allies 35% faster.

minor.name: Re-Boots
minor.description: Activating Glide Boost resets Double Jump.

major.name: Master Blaster
major.description: Mediblaster can critically hit enemies.

major.name: Locked On
major.description: Pulsar Torpedoes cooldown reduces by 1.5 seconds for every enemy hit.

lore: Juno grew up in the low-gravity environment of the Martian colonies and arrived on Earth like someone who had studied the planet extensively and was absolutely not prepared for how loud it actually is. Her support kit revolves around speed and mobility — glide-boosts and orbital rays that keep her teammates supplied and in motion. She experiences Earth's conflicts with the barely contained excitement of someone who has wanted to be here her entire life.

name: Kiriko

primaryWeapon.name: Healing Ofuda
primaryWeapon.damage: None — up to 120 total healing per burst to a targeted ally
primaryWeapon.description: Channel a burst of paper talismans that automatically seek and heal a targeted ally.

secondaryWeapon.name: Kunai
secondaryWeapon.description: Throw precise kunai at enemies. Headshots deal triple damage.

passive.name: Wall Climb
passive.description: Kiriko can climb walls, giving her strong vertical positioning and escape options.

abilities.name: Swift Step
abilities.description: Instantly teleport to a targeted ally, passing through barriers and walls.

abilities.name: Protection Suzu
abilities.description: Throw a charm that briefly makes nearby allies invulnerable and cleanses most negative effects.

ultimate.name: Kitsune Rush
ultimate.type: Ultimate team speed and cooldown buff
ultimate.description: Summon a kitsune spirit that rushes forward, boosting the movement speed, attack speed, and cooldown recovery of allies that follow in its path.

minor.name: Urgent Care
minor.description: Healing Ofuda projectile speed increases 50% when seeking critically wounded allies.

minor.name: Fortune Teller
minor.description: Kunai hits launch two Healing Ofuda toward the ally in front.

major.name: Shuffling
major.description: Swift Step can be used again within four seconds of the initial cast.

major.name: Foxtrot
major.description: Protection Suzu grants allies 40% movement speed for two seconds.

lore: Kiriko Kamori is a young shrine maiden from Kanezaka in Tokyo, trained in both the traditional kitsune fox spirit arts of her grandmother and the more grounded ninja techniques passed down through her mother's side of the family. She grew up alongside Genji and Hanzo Shimada and now uses her swiftness and healing ofuda to protect her community from the forces that took over after the yakuza left. Her kitsune spirit runs beside her.

name: Lifeweaver

primaryWeapon.name: Healing Blossom
primaryWeapon.damage: None — up to 90 healing per charge on a targeted ally
primaryWeapon.description: Hold to charge a healing burst, then release to heal a targeted ally. Higher charge means more healing, up to 90.

secondaryWeapon.name: Thorn Volley
secondaryWeapon.description: Rapidly fires a spread of projectiles at enemies.

passive.name: Parting Gift
passive.description: When Lifeweaver dies, he drops a healing flower that the first hero to walk over it can pick up.

abilities.name: Petal Platform
abilities.description: Throw a platform that springs upward when stepped on, boosting allies or enemies to high ground.

abilities.name: Life Grip
abilities.description: Pull a targeted ally to your location, protecting and cleansing them as they travel.

abilities.name: Rejuvenating Dash
abilities.description: Dash in the direction of movement and lightly heal yourself.

ultimate.name: Tree of Life
ultimate.description: Place a large tree that instantly heals nearby allies when it sprouts, then continues to heal them periodically while it lives.

minor.name: Cleansing Grasp
minor.description: Life Grip cleanses negative effects from the pulled ally.

minor.name: Life Cycle
minor.description: While alive, regenerate 10 health/second; upon death, drop a healing seed restoring 250 health to the first ally who collects it.

major.name: Lifeweaving
major.description: Rejuvenating Dash adds 20 bonus healing to the next Healing Blossom within three seconds.

major.name: Superbloom
major.description: Thorns detonate for 30 extra damage when enough stick within 1.5 seconds.

lore: Niran Pruksamanee is a Thai bio-engineer who developed Biolight — a revolutionary fusion of organic botanical science and energy-based medical technology — and has spent his career proving that the future of medicine is grown, not manufactured. Estranged from his family over choices they struggled to accept, he offers healing through petals and life-grip to anyone who needs it, no questions asked. He is gentle about almost everything except his vision.

name: Lúcio
