primaryWeapon.name: Sonic Amplifier
primaryWeapon.damage: Projectile burst damage / Soundwave knockback on alternate fire
primaryWeapon.description: Fires bursts of sound projectiles. Alternate fire (Soundwave) pushes back nearby enemies with a blast of sound.

passive.name: Wall Ride
passive.description: Lúcio can skate along walls, gaining speed and regenerating 4 ammo per second while wall riding.

abilities.name: Crossfade
abilities.description: Switch between Heal Song (passively heals nearby allies at 20 HPS) and Speed Song (increases ally movement and attack speed by 20%).

abilities.name: Amp It Up
abilities.description: Greatly amplify the current song for a short burst, massively increasing healing output or speed boost.

abilities.name: Soundwave
abilities.description: Blast nearby enemies away. Wall riding empowers the next Soundwave with 25% extra knockback and 50% extra damage.

ultimate.name: Sound Barrier
ultimate.description: Leap into the air and provide a large burst of temporary overhealth to all nearby allies.

minor.name: Bass Blowout
minor.description: Soundwave's knockback increases 15%.

minor.name: Beat Drop
minor.description: Amp It Up remains active during Sound Barrier.

major.name: Noise Violation
major.description: Crossfade's range increases 150% while Amp It Up is active.

major.name: Accelerando
major.description: Lúcio's attack speed increases 50% while Amp It Up is active.

lore: Lúcio Correia dos Santos is a Brazilian DJ and activist who grew up in a favela forcibly restructured by the Vishkar Corporation, and responded by reverse-engineering their sonic technology and using it to drive them out. He took his music and his movement global, using his beat-driven abilities to heal allies and accelerate pushes in equal measure. His beats are a form of liberation that scales to any size crowd.

name: Mercy

primaryWeapon.name: Caduceus Staff
primaryWeapon.damage: Heals ally at 60 HPS / boosts ally damage output by 25%
primaryWeapon.description: Tether to an ally to heal them at 60 HP per second, or boost their damage by 25%. Cannot do both simultaneously.

passive.name: Regeneration
passive.description: Mercy heals herself at 20 HP per second after not taking damage for 1 second.

abilities.name: Guardian Angel
abilities.description: Fly rapidly toward a targeted ally. Duration is 5.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Flash Heal
abilities.description: Instantly heal a targeted ally for 60 health.

abilities.name: Resurrect
abilities.description: Revive a targeted dead ally at their location with full health.

ultimate.name: Valkyrie
ultimate.description: Enter free flight mode, chain the healing or damage beam to multiple allies, and enhance all abilities for the duration.

minor.name: Angelic Resurrection
minor.description: Mercy gains 100 overhealth after casting Resurrect.

minor.name: Winged Reach
minor.description: Guardian Angel's range increases 30%.

major.name: Chain Boost
major.description: Caduceus Staff's secondary fire links to a second nearby ally.

major.name: Flash Heal
major.description: Resurrect becomes usable on Caduceus Staff's active target to restore 150 health; 15 second cooldown.

lore: Dr. Angela Ziegler is a Swiss physician and scientist who developed the Caduceus staff — capable of healing critical wounds and amplifying combat performance — and joined Overwatch with the firm belief that her work should serve life, not just soldiers. She has seen more death than any doctor should and refused to accept it as final, pursuing resurrection technology that blurs the line between miracle and hubris. The cost of that pursuit is something she carries quietly.

name: Mizuki

primaryWeapon.name: Spirit Glaive
primaryWeapon.damage: 30 impact + 30 damage over time; headshots double the impact damage to 60
primaryWeapon.description: Throw a spinning glaive that bounces off walls and surfaces, dealing impact damage plus damage over time on hit. Headshots double the impact portion only.

passive.name: Remedy Aura
passive.description: Passively heals nearby allies. Healing output scales with resources generated by dealing damage and healing others. As a Survivor support, using a movement ability triggers additional passive health regeneration.

abilities.name: Healing Kasa
abilities.description: Throw your kasa hat to heal a targeted ally. The hat then bounces between nearby allies, healing each one in turn before returning to heal Mizuki.

abilities.name: Katashiro Return
abilities.description: Leap forward, leaving behind a paper doll. Reactivate to teleport back to the doll's position. Grants increased movement speed (30%) while active.

abilities.name: Binding Chain
abilities.description: Launch a chain at an enemy that hinders their movement, preventing them from using movement abilities or walking away from the tether.

ultimate.name: Kekkai Sanctuary
ultimate.type: Ultimate area healing and projectile absorption
ultimate.description: Create a sanctuary around a location that heals all allies inside it and absorbs enemy projectiles fired from outside the area.

minor.name: Wellspring
minor.description: Remedy Aura generation increases 25%.

minor.name: Exposed Soul
minor.description: Binding Chain hit grants 30% damage bonus for 2 seconds.

major.name: Resonant Return
major.description: Healing Kasa bounces an additional time; healing increases by 10 per bounce.

major.name: Quickstep
major.description: While Katashiro Return is active, nearby allies gain 25% movement speed.

lore: Mizuki Kawano was born in Fukuoka under a shadow of misfortune — his father, convinced their bloodline was cursed, dragged them to Tokyo, fell into debt with the Hashimoto Clan, and was eventually found dead, leaving nine-year-old Mizuki to inherit that debt. The Clan took him in and raised him in their service, but it was a captured weaponsmith named Toshiro Yamagami who gave him genuine kindness and, finally, his own anima kusarigama — a symbol of faith in his ability to forge his own fate. Now in Kanezaka, Mizuki has joined the Yokai, torn between his obligations to the Hashimoto and his desire to protect the friends he has come to care about.

name: Moira

primaryWeapon.name: Biotic Grasp
primaryWeapon.damage: 50 DPS to enemies (right hand) / 70 HPS to allies (left hand)
primaryWeapon.cooldown: Biotic energy regenerates at 16% per second
primaryWeapon.description: Left-click heals a nearby ally with a short-range beam. Right-click damages enemies and restores Moira's biotic energy.

passive.name: Support
passive.description: Passively regenerates health after a short period without taking damage.

abilities.name: Biotic Orb
abilities.damage: Damages enemies or heals allies depending on mode; bounces off walls
abilities.description: Launch a sphere that bounces around the environment, either healing allies or damaging enemies.

abilities.name: Fade
abilities.description: Disappear, move faster, and become invulnerable for a short time. Cannot attack while fading.

ultimate.name: Coalescence
ultimate.damage: 140 DPS to enemies / 70 HPS to allies simultaneously
ultimate.description: Fire a long-range beam that passes through barriers, simultaneously healing allies and damaging enemies. Fade can be used during Coalescence.

minor.name: Vanish
minor.description: Fade's duration increases 0.5 seconds.

minor.name: Uprush
minor.description: Fade's jump height increases 50%.

major.name: Ethical Nourishment
major.description: Biotic Orb's first 50 healing to each ally encountered is instant.

major.name: Contamination
major.description: Enemies damaged by Biotic Orb receive 25% reduced healing.

lore: Dr. Moira O'Deorain is an Irish geneticist of extraordinary and unchecked ambition who pushes biological science past every ethical limit the field has established, pursuing discoveries too dangerous for legitimate institutions and too interesting to stop. She has augmented her own body with biotic technology that channels both restorative and corrosive energy simultaneously, blurring the line between healer and weapon. She regards conventional morality as a bureaucratic obstacle to human potential.

name: Wuyang

primaryWeapon.name: Xuanwu Staff
primaryWeapon.description: Fire a water orb that can be steered mid-flight by holding the trigger. The longer it charges and travels, the more powerful the explosion on impact.

passive.name: Survivor
passive.description: Health regeneration activates after only 3 seconds without taking damage, faster than most heroes. Using a movement ability also triggers passive health regeneration.

abilities.name: Restorative Stream
abilities.description: Place a passive healing stream on an ally at 25 HPS. Hold the button to manually channel at 75 HPS total, consuming healing resource that regenerates over time.

abilities.name: Rushing Torrent
abilities.description: Ride a wave of water to move faster and jump higher. Restores 10 ammo and 33% of healing resource on activation.

abilities.name: Guardian Wave
abilities.description: Send a water wave forward that amplifies healing received by nearby allies by 50% and knocks back enemies. Heals nearby allies for 80 HP and Wuyang for 40 HP.

ultimate.name: Tidal Blast
ultimate.description: Envelop an ally or yourself in a water barrier granting 300 overhealth. After 3 seconds, the barrier detonates, knocking down nearby enemies and healing the target for 250 HP.

minor.name: Overflow
minor.description: Gain 10 ammo and 50% healing resource when Rushing Torrent is activated.

minor.name: Balance
minor.description: When you deal damage with water orbs, increase Restorative Stream's passive healing by 30% for 2 seconds.

major.name: Ebb and Flow
major.description: Guardian Wave rewinds to its starting location.

major.name: Falling Rain
major.description: Simultaneously control 3 water orbs that deal 60% decreased damage and have 25% decreased empowered explosion radius.

lore: Wuyang Ye always dreamed of following his family's legacy into Wuxing University's prestigious Fire College, only to be accepted into the Water College instead — a blow to his pride that became an unexpected gift as he discovered a natural talent for qi gong and traditional Chinese healing. When Null Sector attacked Chengdu, he rushed to save his sister Anran using his water-based combat techniques, and the siblings fought their way free together. Winston recruited them both after witnessing the footage; Wuyang accepted with renewed confidence and his sister's encouragement.

name: Zenyatta

primaryWeapon.name: Orb of Destruction
primaryWeapon.damage: 46 per orb; charged volley fires all current orbs in a burst
primaryWeapon.description: Throws damaging orbs at enemies. Alternate fire charges a volley of all current orbs for a burst of simultaneous damage.

passive.name: Snap Kick
passive.description: Zenyatta's melee attack deals significantly more damage than a standard quick melee.

abilities.name: Orb of Harmony
abilities.description: Attach a healing orb to an ally, restoring their health over time. The orb persists as long as Zenyatta maintains line of sight.

abilities.name: Orb of Discord
abilities.damage: Amplifies all damage taken by the target by 30%
abilities.description: Attach a debuff orb to an enemy, causing them to take 30% more damage from all sources. Removed if line of sight is broken for 1.5 seconds.

ultimate.name: Transcendence
ultimate.description: Enter a state of pure energy, becoming invulnerable and moving faster while healing all nearby allies at 300 HP per second.

minor.name: Zenith Kick
minor.description: Snap Kick's knockback distance increases 30%.

minor.name: Ascendance
minor.description: Activate and hold Double Jump to hover up to three seconds.

major.name: Focused Destruction
major.description: Secondary fire charges 20% faster; stores one extra Orb of Destruction.

major.name: Duality
major.description: Zenyatta heals Orb of Harmony targets for 20% of damage dealt to Orb of Discord targets.

lore: Tekhartha Zenyatta is a Shambali omnic monk who broke from the monastery's doctrine to wander the world and form genuine personal connections with humans, believing that understanding grows from relationship rather than instruction. He became Genji's mentor at a critical moment and helped him make peace with the fractured existence of being neither fully human nor fully machine. He throws orbs of harmony and destruction with equal tranquility, fully at peace with the contradiction.
